name: localemu
desc: LocalEmu: a free, open-source AWS emulator. Run 132 AWS services locally with one pip install. No account, no token, no telemetry. The drop-in LocalStack alter…
descFull: LocalEmu: a free, open-source AWS emulator. Run 132 AWS services locally with one pip install. No account, no token, no telemetry. The drop-in LocalStack alternative for the AWS CLI, boto3, Terraform and CDK.
